results.title: Tour de France: Defending champ retains overall lead
results.description: BERGERAC, France -- Belgian rider Tim Merlier won the eighth stage of the Tour de France in a sprint finish to claim back-to-back-stage victories, while defending champion Tadej Pogacar kept the race leader's yellow jersey on Saturday.

results.title: BBC commentator explains decision to quit Wimbledon after bombshell dropped on air
results.description: The former British No.1's departure from the broadcaster's coverage of the tournament was confirmed live on air

results.title: Glamorous former Wimbledon finalist leaves BBC job one day before tournament ends
results.description: EUGENIE BOUCHARD finished at Wimbledon with a day left of the tournament - and she went out in style. The former finalist, 32, was on punditry duty for BBC during the Championships. But her work was done after the women's final on Saturday. And Canadian Genie showed off how things went at the All England...

results.title: First-ever chuckwagon races at Presley Farms in Central Arkansas a hit
results.description: PERRY -- Seven weeks ahead of the National Championship Chuckwagon Race in Clinton, the small town of Perry is hosting its first-ever chuckwagon racing event over the weekend at Presley Farms.

results.title: Tulu film ‘Gajanana Cricketers’ completes 50 days in theatres
results.description: Daijiworld Media Network – Mangaluru Mangaluru, Jul 12: Tulu film ‘Gajanana Cricketers (Jantottu Since 1983)’, produced under the banner of Prajwal Films by Prajwal Shetty and directed by Keerthan Bhandary, which released on May 22 has completed a 50-day run at theatres....
